reviews.review_title: I see this on clips and had to try it it
reviews.review_description: Game has pretty great hand tracking and is also or can be very literal on exact contact directions as well took me forever to figure out why my block was missing because I had to actually rotate my hands and not just put them up stationary all together I love this game so much just bought the full version would recommend to anyone looking to stay active and experience almost full immersion VR games very fun

The app is very good. I like the graphics and I like how the app tracks how much calories you burned after finishing a course. The gameplay good to as it's similar to beat saber which makes the app even more better. The hand tracking was good too. However, the music kinda sucks in my opinion and I wish this game would let you choose your own music. Despite that, Fitness Free is a must-try for people that want a perfect exercise when playing on VR.

There were a couple of glitches when boxing. It  appears to skip and then miss. I did not see where there was a subscription. But there is an option to open the full version. I have not opted for that because of the glitches. I haven't seen the cost.

The visuals are ok but the hit detection on uppercut/cross is flakey (hand tracking in well lit room with no mirrors) and just not enough content to decide if i want the game (or how much content is in the game).  Absolutely no trainer aspect and songs are junk.  

Ironically it is actually unclear in game what the paid game is from the various lock icons (ie unlocked by playing, in app subscription or a seperate app); If they want to convert buyers they need more clarity and better content.

I got this to try out to see if I would like it.And it is absolutely amazing. I haven't worked out in years because I have back issues and now knee issues, but I wanted to exercise, to feel good again and maybe lose a few pounds. I enjoyed this app so much because it's fun makes me feel accomplished. I love Boxing and I actually break a sweat and I used to just do two sets each time but now I want to do more and more and more because it just feels so good.

The ppl that rated this anything less than 5 stars must be high on some strong drugs cuz this game is awesome. Such a good workout and actually so much fun. It’s like beat saber but way more movement. What’s there to dislike? 
The fish bumping thing took a few minutes to figure out but incredibly easy once you figure out the movement. If it’s not working try restarting the app or using a guide on YouTube.

I tried the free workouts on their most difficult level (hell) and didn’t get much from it. The gaps between punches are too long so I didn’t get out of breath or heart rate up. Great visuals and music and music though…

I wasn’t into boxing fitness until I tried this. Now I’m addicted. Good choice of music too. Now one of my favourite fitness apps! 
Suggestion for dev:
Punching the fists together to start the workout is a bit hard. (especially for those with finger arthritis) Perhaps just punching a start button similar to the level choices would work better.

Oh, I love it so basically it is free. You get to play over and over again but if you want the full demo, you can purchase a full demo for it to unlock more but since people right now are struggling was financing money and you know Weight Loss and can’t exercise so this is a good opportunity to like play the game and restart every time your levels are up and then it changes every time you win a match and everything so it is free so you get a chance and everything but do it and that’s what I’m doing so try it out. It has good quality and it’s very fun.

As a 13 year old this game is okay but the hand tracking is horrible and the uppercuts don’t even work unless you line it up perfectly and I don’t think this game is very good but everything else is not as bad but the hand tracking needs to be 
fixed

So I want to like it looks like a mix of a couple games that really like. Calibration is sadly needed I couldn’t figure it out. The hits were great for jabs but uppercuts I missed nearly every thing. It kept telling me to back up and I was behind where it told me to stand.
Ita a good game it helped alot and now i can train and play
You need to bump fists to start, but that does not work. It's not just me because I have seen other reviews that said this. Can't even play your game.

This game is wuite good but there are some problems for example the hand tracking isn't that good so i prefer to use the controllers and even with the controllers a lot of hooks and uppercuts don't register.
I read the review about fist bumping not working and took a chance anyway. But unfortunately I could not play the game because I had that issue! Any tips or tricks?

I got it because I needed to work out more and I wanted a new game and saw it was a target practice game.
I thought they were lying about it being a fitness game i was extremely wrong after playing i was sore then next day I was in agony because I over did it. It worked every muscle it should.
Im not to fit and on my first play I went up to hard START ON EASY.

Why is there no adjustments for controller to not hit each other and the same thing for hand tracking like come on. I can't even start a song with controllers because they hit each other amd not even flipping over will trigger the starting fist bump. Than on top of that I need to hurt my nucleus just to get pass the fist bump with hand tracking like come on people do better.
Very good game

I’m enjoying this game. I don’t love that the colors are opposite. You would think they would match the target color to the correct hand color right vs left but otherwise can’t really complain. I wish there were more songs to choose from too.

I Played the free version and got hooked. I purchased the full version and it's pretty good. Hopefully in the future they add more challenging levels but if you put some weights on your wrists it gets pretty intense

when is upgrade the full version  or where it? 
  because I don't open other games. thery is block.
I love this app great music as well gets you in mood, but can only do 1 of the male an 1 of email but how do you unlock the rest, appreciate help
Wonderful

I like this but can't figure out how to pay and unlock the other modes/exercises. 
Help
What an app for fitness. Great for all levels of people and nice graphics, great tunes and a really good fitness from easy to hard
As a man in my 40s, this is the perfect workout to get rid of the beer belly! 20 mins a day is all it takes for me. 5/5

I train with this every other day.
What I miss is that the levels are quick to learn and the music is boring and sometimes it doesn't detect my hand.
But overall I love it.

reviews.review_title: WHY must everything spawn UP IN THE AIR?
reviews.review_description:
2 platforms and ones on a frickin TRANSPARENT space tunnel and the other is IN TOP OF A SKYSCRAPER moving road. I can’t play either of these standing as I GET VERTIGO!

I can’t concentrate on the game if I’m afraid to move enough to effectively play!

Also only one song and character. 

Plus, plus, being up in the clouds to use the menu board? Yeah, see my initial beef.

The graphics and game mechanics are nice, but I just can’t deal with another game developers fascination with starting play at extreme heights.
This isn’t the Climb fervgawds sake!
Help how do I get the payed version please
How do you up grade this?

reviews.review_title: very good and i would recommend to try
reviews.review_description: I don’t know how people are facing issues with this Fitness app, but it works great on my meta quest. 3 years Graphics are awesome. I am using the free version, so I am limited up to 2 type of exercises and I would recommend everybody to try and find it is better than the other apps out there ￼
This app is great! I would definitely recommend the full version if you like the free one.
Just installed it today on my 3S and looks like a good work out but only problem I got is the duel fist one I keep getting a miss. I'm holding my fist up in front of myself but it still show a miss

This game gives you a real workout.
I enjoy the boxing part and am looking forward to advancing to other parts of the game. I plan to use  this as a regular part of my exercise routine.
The game cant even load waste of storage
I've tried bumping my fist in any different ways and angles but I can't make it to start.
So free is not the word.. basic game that wants you to buy the non free version after 15mins.. graphics are not all that great same tune same workout.. boring!
I got the free version of this and I’m using it months later never had to pay
I actually like this app and keep coming back to it. Yes, there are locked levels you would have to pay to enter, but it is fun and love the music.
To slow even on the more intense challenges. Def wasted my money

I love this game !!! Such a work out !!
Just gotta make sure you don’t put a hole in the wall!!! Love it love it!!! Fun game !!
Simple and nice
Love this game. This is the first fitness game I keep going back to, I put wrist weights on and away I go. The only issue I have is need more choice of music. Other than that, keep up the good work😀

Didn’t work from start. Bumped fists in every possible direction and angle. 
Going to delete

This game gave me a great workout. I love that place music. I love that’s doing boxing. I love it helps my triceps and biceps. I love it. ￼ they should add more songs though. 
￼
But I can't figure out how to block lol any help?

reviews.review_title: Love the game, but does it work?
reviews.review_description: I loved the free trial and bought the game. As soon as I bought it, it stopped working. So I returned it. If it works, I’d love to keep it!
Feels good but the workout is way too way won’t even sweat😂
First fitness game, loved it so far! 😱
It’s good but like other reviews mentioned, it’s very limited unless you pay for more

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We appreciate your perspective. Just to clarify, this version is a demo, which is designed to give players a taste of what the full game offers. We understand that it may feel limited, but we hope you’ll consider trying out the complete version for a more expansive experience.

reviews.review_description: I love this program. It’s easy for me to use but the undercut jabs are all marking as misses after I have completed half the game
It’s good but it only gives you one think if you don’t want to pay… and even paying for it wasn’t worth it so… 1 star
Does the job. I like it
Great game the sweat is real

developer_response.body: So glad you're enjoying the gameplay! 💦 Nothing beats that adrenaline rush

reviews.review_description: The game is excellent, I bought it immediately. Can an update be added to add designs or music from artificial intelligence? I wish you success.

developer_response.body:
Hi ahmed0741, thank you for your excellent review and for your immediate support! Regarding your suggestion about adding designs or music from artificial intelligence - that's a very interesting and innovative idea. While we don't currently have this feature implemented, we're always exploring new ways to enhance the game experience.

To stay updated on our latest features and to share more of your thoughts, we invite you to join our Discord community (https://discord.gg/HX2DGCx6ra). It's a great place to connect with other players, discuss ideas, and get the latest news about the game.

Thank you again for your support! We look forward to potentially seeing you in our Discord~

reviews.review_title: Great game! No communication from devs
reviews.review_description:
The game is a lot of fun and well worth trying the demo. The commitment to buying the game is where I'm hesitant solely because the devs have a single post in one of their discord channels directing you to socials (YouTube and TikTok) and every other channel is empty, a bot welcoming someone, or the general chat from other users wondering why there's no communication from the devs. Easy 5 stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ if there was communication or a roadmap from the devs.

I'll update my review if there's communication from them in their discord but for now, not worth joining that even

developer_response.body:
Hi Vexen89, 
Thank you for your positive feedback and for highlighting areas where we can improve. We appreciate your support and understand your concern regarding communication from the developers. We're actively working on enhancing our presence on Discord of Rhythm Punch. Additionally, we have another Discord channel (https://discord.com/invite/UpFwwnV6PZ) where all  the devs and staff are in it (It's a collective discord channel of all our horror games tho).

reviews.review_title: Fun and nice graphics but 1 flaw..
reviews.review_description:
Great game looks very nice. Hand tracking is good BUT as soon as you get uppercuts and hooks you notice the problem here...

Left and right hooks are the worse as tracking gets instantly lost unless you make very small left and right swipes which defeats the purpose of an exercise game..

Front punches are usually not an issue but tracking the hooks and uppercuts just doesn't work unless you make very small movements..
Shame...I like it but  fast movements and hand tracking just do not work..

developer_response.body:
Hi fonejackerjon,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We're glad to hear that you enjoy the game and find the graphics appealing. We understand your frustration regarding the hand tracking issues, particularly with left and right hooks.

To improve tracking accuracy, we recommend adjusting your positioning slightly to ensure that your movements are fully captured by the device camera. Lowering your hands a bit might help the camera to better track your gestures, especially during faster movements like hooks and uppercuts.

We appreciate your feedback on this matter, and please know that we've already forwarded your concerns to our development team for further investigation and resolution. We're continuously working to enhance the gameplay experience, and your input is invaluable to us. If you have any additional feedback or questions, please don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you for your support and patience as we work to address this issue.

reviews.review_description: Visually nice, but very limited demo is slow even on the hardest level of play, so it's hard to decide whether to buy the full version of the game.

developer_response.body:
Hi johnnyb2012,

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with us. We appreciate your feedback regarding the Fit demo. We understand that the limited demo may not fully reflect the intensity level you're accustomed to, particularly for those with advanced fitness levels. Our aim in designing the game is to offer an experience that caters to a wide range of players, from beginners to seasoned athletes. We strive to strike a balance between challenge and accessibility in our gameplay mechanics. Your input is valuable to us as we continue to refine and improve our offerings!

reviews.review_description: It's a really good workout . This is a really good game.
Good graphics and design the only issue is hand tracking it loses your hands if you move to its blind spots
